Couture Saree · Look 01

The Jewel Box Saree

There's a version of this saree that could have leaned safe, with the gemstone work confined to a border or a panel. Instead, the blouse takes the embellishment all the way to the edges, in emerald, ruby and sapphire tones set against a mirror-finished base, so the eye never quite settles on one stone for long. The saree itself is woven in a champagne silk loose enough to drape easily over the shoulder but firm enough to hold a pleat through a full evening.

INR 1,45,000
Made to order — delivery in 6 to 8 weeks
Craftsmanship Notes
Each gemstone is set into a mirrored foil backing before it goes onto the blouse canvas, a technique three generations of karigars in Hyderabad still teach by hand rather than diagram. No two stones sit at quite the same angle, which is deliberate — it's what keeps the surface catching light differently depending on where you're standing.
Materials
Pure silk saree, hand-embellished blouse on cotton-silk base, mixed semi-precious stone settings, gold-tone metal trims.
Shipping & Custom Fit
Made-to-order pieces include a complimentary fitting consultation. Ready-to-ship pieces are dispatched within 3 business days. All custom and made-to-order pieces are non-returnable and non-refundable, as outlined in our care policy.
